title: Crumbly Algerian Tahini Crumble
description: A herbal, crumbly dish featuring tahini, perfect for a lazy Sunday and suitable for plant-based diets.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup chopped fresh herbs (such as parsley, mint, and dill)

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and salt. Blend until smooth.
Pour the tahini mixture into a mixing bowl. Add olive oil and herbs; stir well.
Stir in crushed nuts and red pepper flakes. Mix until evenly distributed.
Transfer the crumble to a baking dish lined with parchment paper or cooking spray.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, stirring halfway through, until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
